name: case_docketing
description: A court case-docketing world: a single matter advances on the docket as documents are filed, hearings scheduled, continuances granted, and a ruling issued -- all against deadlines that are missed if they pass unmet.

card.description: A court case-docketing world: a single matter advances on the docket as documents are filed, hearings scheduled, continuances granted, and a ruling issued -- all against deadlines that are missed if they pass unmet.

rules: Each processed action advances the docket clock by exactly one day.
'file' records a document and satisfies the earliest still-open deadline.
'schedule' sets the hearing date and opens a 'pretrial_brief' deadline due seven days before the hearing.
'continue' grants a continuance, pushing the hearing and every unmet deadline later by the requested number of days.
'rule' issues the ruling and decides the case; once decided the matter is final and further actions leave the state unchanged.
A deadline is missed when its due date has passed while it remains unmet.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name")
    params = action.get("params") or {}

    # nested structures must be copied so we never mutate the caller's state
    s["deadlines"] = [dict(d) for d in s.get("deadlines", [])]
    s["docket"] = list(s.get("docket", []))

    day = s.get("day", 0)

    if name == "file":
        # File a document; it satisfies the earliest still-open deadline.
        doc = params.get("document", "document")
        s["filings"] = s.get("filings", 0) + 1
        satisfied = None
        for d in s["deadlines"]:
            if not d.get("met"):
                d["met"] = True
                satisfied = d.get("name")
                break
        note = "filed " + str(doc)
        if satisfied:
            note += " (meets '" + str(satisfied) + "' deadline)"
        s["docket"].append("day " + str(day) + ": " + note)

    elif name == "schedule":
        # Set a hearing date and open a pre-hearing brief deadline 7 days prior.
        in_days = params.get("in_days", 14)
        hearing = day + int(in_days)
        s["hearing_day"] = hearing
        brief_due = max(day, hearing - 7)
        if not any(d.get("name") == "pretrial_brief" for d in s["deadlines"]):
            s["deadlines"].append(
                {"name": "pretrial_brief", "due": brief_due, "met": False})
        s["docket"].append(
            "day " + str(day) + ": hearing scheduled for day " + str(hearing))

    elif name == "continue":
        # Grant a continuance: push the hearing and every unmet deadline later.
        by = int(params.get("by", 14))
        s["continuances"] = s.get("continuances", 0) + 1
        if s.get("hearing_day") is not None:
            s["hearing_day"] = s["hearing_day"] + by
        for d in s["deadlines"]:
            if not d.get("met"):
                d["due"] = d.get("due", day) + by
        s["docket"].append(
            "day " + str(day) + ": continuance granted (+" + str(by) + " days)")

    elif name == "rule":
        # Judge issues a ruling and the matter is decided. No-op once decided.
        if s.get("status") == "open":
            ruling = params.get("ruling", "judgment entered")
            s["status"] = "decided"
            s["ruling"] = str(ruling)
            s["docket"].append("day " + str(day) + ": ruling -- " + str(ruling))
        else:
            return s  # already decided: clock does not advance

    else:
        return s  # unrecognized action: no change

    # The docket clock advances one day per processed item.
    s["day"] = day + 1

    # Recount missed deadlines: unmet and past due as of the new day.
    missed = 0
    for d in s["deadlines"]:
        d["overdue"] = (not d.get("met")) and d.get("due", 0) < s["day"]
        if d["overdue"]:
            missed += 1
    s["missed_deadlines"] = missed
    return s

emit.report: Docket status (day {day}): case is {status}; {filings} filing(s), {continuances} continuance(s); hearing on day {hearing_day}; {missed_deadlines} missed deadline(s); ruling: {ruling}.
